name: generate_client_token
description: Generate a client token to initialize the Braintree client SDK on the frontend. The client token authorizes the browser or mobile app to securely collect and tokenize payment information using Drop-in UI or Hosted Fields. This is the first step in any Braintree payment flow -- your server generates the token, passes it to the client, and the client uses it to create a payment method nonce.
note: Braintree uses a GraphQL API. The legacy REST API endpoint is POST /merchants/{merchant_id}/client_token.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: Optional vault customer ID. If provided, the generated token will include the customer's vaulted payment methods for faster checkout.

parameters.name: merchant_account_id
parameters.description: The merchant account ID to use. If you have multiple merchant accounts (e.g., for different currencies), specify which one.
